_readme: Machine-readable companion to docs/reference/MINED_SKILLS_SOURCES.md. Every entry here was verified against the live repository on 2026-07-12 (git ls-remote + raw.githubusercontent.com file fetch at a pinned commit where a commit is recorded). Nothing here was invented; see 'notes' for caveats and see the registry doc for the full explanation of 'verbatim' vs 'adapted_from'.

sources.notes: Backs pr_merge (adapted-from, near-verbatim per SOURCES.md) and the pr_merge_upstream cluster. All 6 permalinks above confirmed HTTP 200 at the pinned commit.
Harvested for the general corpus (158 artifacts); did not contribute a test-real item.

Backs doc_pipeline (adapted-from, near-verbatim per SOURCES.md; not a test-real item as of W17). Root LICENSE confirmed absent (404); docx/pdf/pptx/xlsx confirmed restrictive-license and correctly quarantined by ledger.py.
This is the CrewAI framework's own repo, distinct from the unlicensed crewAI-examples repo below. Backs 2 of the 5 test-real items.

FLAGGED: repo confirmed live but has NO license file anywhere (root LICENSE 404 at both main and the pinned commit; no `license =` in any pyproject.toml; README says only 'check individual examples', none do). ledger.py::REPO_LICENSES correctly omits this repo and quarantines every freshly-harvested artifact from it, BUT ledger.py::IN_REPO_UPSTREAMS still hardcodes the in-repo content_pipeline adaptation as spdx='MIT', which contradicts the live finding. content_pipeline (a test-real item) should not be described as resting on a permissively-licensed real upstream until this is resolved.
W17 fallback source (259 harvested artifacts, 0 test-real items; no collaboration language found in a representative sample).

Adapted-from source for airline_seat. SOURCES.md records 'Commit at retrieval: main' (no SHA); exact file confirmed live at branch tip, containing triage_agent/seat_booking_agent/update_seat/on_seat_booking_handoff as claimed.

Adapted-from source for booking_saga (not a test-real item; extracted-but-incompatible per W16/W17, a genuine deadlock). SOURCES.md names only a general pattern ('supervisor/orchestrator node', 'reservation worker', 'payment worker'), no specific file path, so no exact-file permalink can be constructed without guessing.

Adapted-from source for code_execution (not a test-real item; extracted-but-incompatible, a coverage gap). CORRECTION: root LICENSE is CC-BY-4.0, not MIT as SOURCES.md implies by saying 'MIT-licensed AutoGen' -- the code itself is MIT under a separate LICENSE-CODE file, confirmed live, so the underlying claim is defensible but imprecise as originally stated. No specific file path recorded in SOURCES.md, so no exact-file permalink is possible.

cited_standards.name: Anthropic Agent Skills open standard (SKILL.md)
cited_standards.notes: Direct HTTPS fetch of www.anthropic.com returned 403 host_not_allowed from this session's outbound proxy (sandbox network policy, not a sign the page is missing). Confirmed via web search (consistent title/description across independent results) plus the fully-verified reference-implementation repo anthropics/skills.
